input.command:
export WINEPREFIX=/Users/steven/.lcwine
COH="/Users/steven/Library/Application Support/LaunchCat/coh"

echo "=== 1. Kill orphaned Wine session (stops the 99% explorer.exe) ==="
"$COH/wine/bin/wineserver" -k 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 3
echo "remaining coh/wine procs:"
ps aux | grep -iE 'cityofheroes|wine64-preloader|LaunchCat/coh/wine' | grep -v grep || echo "(clean — none)"

echo
echo "=== 2. Reset process state + clean any re-added drive letters ==="
echo '{"live":[]}' > "$COH/settings/launcher/process.json"
DD="$WINEPREFIX/dosdevices"
rm -f "$DD/d:" "$DD/d::" "$DD/e:" "$DD/e::" 2>/dev/null || true
ls -la "$DD"

echo
echo "=== 3. Mark log offset, then relaunch via LaunchCat GUI (fresh auth token) ==="
LOG="$COH/logs/launcher/launcher.log"
wc -c < "$LOG" | tr -d ' ' > /tmp/coh_log_offset.txt
open -a "/Applications/LaunchCat.app"
echo "LaunchCat opening... waiting for launcher to come up"
sleep 8
echo "GUI host:"
ps aux | grep -i 'LaunchCat.app/Contents/MacOS' | grep -v grep | awk '{print "  pid="$2" "$11}' || echo "  (not up yet)"
echo "launcher.exe under wine:"
ps aux | grep -iE 'launcher\.exe' | grep -v grep | awk '{print "  pid="$2}' || echo "  (not up yet)"
input.description: Kill orphan, reset state, relaunch via LaunchCat GUI
